Identification.LongTitle: An Act to amend the Citizenship Act
Identification.ShortTitle: Citizenship Act, An Act to amend the

Provision.Text: Her Majesty, by and with the advice and consent of the Senate and House of Commons of Canada, enacts as follows:

Section.Text: Section 11 of the Citizenship Act is amended by adding the following after subsection (1):

Subsection.Text: The requirement set out in paragraph (1)(d) does not apply to a person who ceased to be a citizen, before February 15, 1977, because a parent of that person ceased to be a citizen as a result of

Paragraph.Label: (a)
Paragraph.Text: acquiring the nationality or citizenship of a country other than Canada; or

Paragraph.Label: (b)
Paragraph.Text: renouncing his or her Canadian citizenship.
